content:
## Changes
<!-- type: changes lang: yaml -->

```yaml
_sdd:
  id: base-snapshot-write
  refs:
    - $ref: "merge-3way#merge-3way-flow"
changes:
  - path: crates/cclab-sdd/src/tools/spec_plan.rs
    action: MODIFY
    description: "Add base snapshot (.base.md) creation during action:modify spec preparation"
    targets:
      - type: function
        name: prepare_modify_spec
        change: "Return a tuple (working_content, Option<base_content>) instead of String. Before mutating frontmatter, clone the raw source content as base_content. Return (modified_content, Some(raw_source)) for modify specs. When source file is missing (fallback to create), return (content, None)."
      - type: function
        name: prepare_specs_from_plan
        change: "After calling prepare_modify_spec(), if base_content is Some, write it to {spec_id}.base.md alongside the working spec. The .base.md write happens in the same loop iteration, immediately before or after writing the working spec."
    do_not_touch:
      - prepare_create_spec
      - deduplicate_spec_plans
      - read_all_spec_plans
      - resolve_section_rules

  - path: crates/cclab-sdd/src/tools/spec_plan.rs
    section: "Tests"
    action: MODIFY
    description: "Add tests for base snapshot creation"
    targets:
      - type: function
        name: test_prepare_modify_creates_base_snapshot
        change: "New test: setup a modify spec entry with existing source file, call prepare_specs_from_plan(), verify {spec_id}.base.md exists alongside {spec_id}.md with unmodified source content"
        position: after
        anchor: test_prepare_modify_copies_and_updates_frontmatter
      - type: function
        name: test_prepare_create_no_base_snapshot
        change: "New test: setup a create spec entry, call prepare_specs_from_plan(), verify no .base.md file is created"
        position: after
        anchor: test_prepare_modify_creates_base_snapshot
      - type: function
        name: test_prepare_modify_missing_source_no_base
        change: "New test: setup a modify spec entry where source file does not exist (fallback to create), verify no .base.md is written"
        position: after
        anchor: test_prepare_create_no_base_snapshot
      - type: function
        name: test_prepare_skip_already_prepared_no_duplicate_base
        change: "New test: pre-create the spec file, call prepare_specs_from_plan(), verify it skips (no .base.md written for already-prepared specs)"
        position: after
        anchor: test_prepare_modify_missing_source_no_base
```
